activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor name 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' appears exactly in the invoice, including address city 'Göteborg' and country 'Sweden'. No conflicting party found. Land matches as Sweden. Verified according to rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Medical Experts Services LLC' is found as Delivery Address in the invoice. No primary 'Invoice To' field that contradicts this. Country Oman matches in both certificate and invoice. No discrepancies found.

goods_description.certificate_value: Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)
goods_description.invoice_value: Components for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertillisation
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains the general goods description with explicit invoice reference 'See attaced invoice 5007905 dated 20260313'. Invoice number 5007905 matches. Thus, goods description is verified according to rule 4.3.5 without needing exact text match.

quantity.motivation: Certificate states 43.8 kg GW. Invoice lists gross weight 43.8 kg but net weight differs significantly (26.6 kg), and weight categories in certificate and invoice are not fully clarified. Weight category GW is specified only in certificate, while invoice has multiple weights. Due to absence of explicit weight categorization confirmation in invoice, weight verification requires manual review.

origin.motivation: Certificate states origin as 'European Community' (EU). Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Sweden,' which is an EU member state. Thus, origin matches according to EU origin normalization rule 4.5.4.1.

manual_review_triggers: Quantity verification requires manual review due to weight category and value discrepancies.
overall_assessment.decision_summary: All key control points except quantity match or verify under allowed rules. Quantity verification cannot be conclusively confirmed due to incomplete weight category correlation and numerical detail, triggering manual review.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan stämmer överens i avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning och ursprungsland. Kvantiteten kan inte verifieras säkert då vikten och viktkategori i fakturan inte entydigt bekräftar certifikatets uppgift. Manuell granskning krävs.
